title: Numbers Display
description: Changes Roman numerals to Arabic numerals throughout Minecraft for enchantments and makes them more efficient to read
body:
# Numbers Display
Tired of reading Roman numerals on your enchanted gear? This lightweight resource pack replaces all Roman numerals (I, II, III, etc.) with standard Arabic numerals (1, 2, 3, etc.) in enchantment names for easier and quicker reading.

### Features:

- Converts Roman numerals to Arabic numerals across all enchantment levels (e.g., "Sharpness V" becomes "Sharpness 5")

- Works in both survival and creative mode

- Compatible with most Minecraft versions (1.18+)

- Purely visual – no changes to gameplay or mechanics

- Perfect for players who prefer clean, modern formatting in their UI or for those who just want to avoid deciphering Roman numerals.
